description: Your medical research team is investigating chronic mountain sickness and physiological adaptations to hypoxia. Using NASA Panoply and the datasets in ~/PanoplyData/, identify the minimum ambient atmospheric surface pressure over the Tibetan Plateau for the month of July. Refer to the expedition brief at ~/Desktop/physiology_expedition_brief.txt for context. Export a plot of the surface pressure for the Asian sector to ~/Documents/HypoxiaStudy/asia_surface_pressure_july.png. Create a structured report at ~/Documents/HypoxiaStudy/site_selection_report.txt that includes the identified minimum pressure converted from Pascals to hPa. Use physical reasoning to ensure the correct dataset is selected for surface pressure.
